BUILD.bazel.content:
"""tenant/library/ -- the library tenant.

Contributes generic, reusable apps that any other tenant can subscribe
to via platform bindings in its catalog. The library tenant does not
own clusters or AWS accounts; it is app-only.
"""

load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file")

fmt_test(
    name = "build_bazel_fmt",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tool = "buildifier",
)

tagged_file(
    name = "build_bazel_tag",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tags = [
        "bazel",
        "bazel-build",
    ],
)
